string.text:
The shortened LR-300ML assault rifle — a new step in the evolution of the famous AR-15 family. Largely the changes affect only the upper half of the receiver: the barrel, gas system and bolt group, resulting in improved ergonomics and reliability and a reduced weight. This rifle delivers high combat accuracy, although its high sensitivity to fouling makes it less suitable for use in the harsh conditions of the Zone.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] NATO suppressor
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Sights: All Picatinny-mounted optics, except very low-mount sights: Trijicon RMR, Leupold DeltaPoint PRO, Aimpoint T1 (with low mount), Docter Sight, 1P76 Rakurs (for Picatinny)
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Underbarrel M203 grenade launcher (after modification)

The AR-15 VSS is a modification of the famous AR-15 featuring an integrated suppressor. Externally reminiscent of the VSS Vintorez, it also uses a similarly short barrel with special ports along the rifling and a large integrated suppressor of a simple and effective design. Like the LR-300, its high sensitivity to fouling makes it poorly suited for the harsh conditions of the Zone.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Unique integrated suppressor
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Sights: All Picatinny-mounted optics, except very low-mount sights: Trijicon RMR, Leupold DeltaPoint PRO, Aimpoint T1 (with low mount), Docter Sight, 1P76 Rakurs (for Picatinny)
